title: Berlin Marathon 2026: Quick Summary
items: **Race day is Sunday 27 September 2026.** Handbikes and wheelchairs start at 08:20, 08:26 and 08:29; runner waves leave at 08:45, 09:05, 09:33, 10:02, 10:12 and 10:27.

**Roads close well before the runners.** The 2025 plan began at 05:00, added central sectors from 06:00 to 08:15, and did not finish reopening them until the evening. Use this only as a planning pattern for 2026.
**Rail is usually the practical crossing.** Check live BVG, VBB or S-Bahn service and use only confirmed surface crossings; do not assume every line or bus is running normally.
**Saturday is affected too.** The 5K starts at 10:00 and inline skating from 12:20 on a multi-lap city circuit, not the runners’ full marathon route.
**For watching, go west and later.** The Memorial Church near km 35 and Potsdamer Platz near km 38.5 are useful alternatives to the crowded Brandenburg Gate finish.
**Check again close to the race.** Use the organiser and Berlin traffic map in the final week, then verify live transport and local barriers on race morning.
